reasons.Service Book: Required under Rule PROM_001 to verify service period and grade history.
reasons.APAR (last 3 years): Required under Rule PROM_004 to verify benchmark performance rating.
reasons.Departmental Exam Result: Required under Rule PROM_006 to confirm examination clearance.
reasons.Penalty Order: Required under Rule DISC_003 to assess disciplinary status.

reasons.Leave Application: Required to initiate the leave request.
reasons.Service Book: Required to verify leave balance and service record.

reasons.Leave Application: Required to initiate the leave request.
reasons.Medical Certificate: Required under Rule LEAVE_005 from a recognized medical officer.
reasons.Hospital Discharge Summary: Required under Rule LEAVE_006 when hospitalization exceeds 48 hours.

reasons.Service Book: Required to verify service continuity and existing pay level.
reasons.Penalty Order: Required to check if increment has been withheld by order.

reasons.Service Book: Required to verify employee's complete service and disciplinary history.
reasons.Charge Sheet: Required to review the nature and basis of the current charge.
reasons.Appeal Letter: Required to process the appeal against the penalty order.
reasons.Original Penalty Order: Required to review the order being appealed.

reasons.Service Book: Required to verify current posting and transfer history.
reasons.Transfer Application: Required as the formal application for transfer.
reasons.Medical Certificate: Required when transfer is sought on medical grounds.
reasons.Spouse Transfer Order: Required when seeking transfer on grounds of spouse posting.

reasons.Service Book: Required to verify eligibility criteria for the examination.
reasons.Exam Application: Required as the formal application to appear in the examination.

reasons.Service Book: Required to verify qualifying service for pension.
reasons.Pension Application: Required as formal application for pension benefits.
reasons.Nomination Form: Required to designate family pension nominee.
